calendar.matters:
Notice Of Date, Time And Place Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER BVH, LLC'S Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award

Petitioner BVH, LLC seeks to confirm the arbitration award entered on March 4, 2025, and seek a final judgment based on the award. A party may seek a court judgment confirming an arbitration or appraisal award by filing and serving a petition at least 10 days, but no more than four years after the award is served. (CCP, sec. 1288 and 1288.4) The court must confirm the award as made, unless it corrects or vacates the award, or dismisses the proceeding. (Id. sec. 1286.) If the award is confirmed, an enforceable judgment is entered with the same force and effect as a judgment in a civil action. (Id., sec. 1287.4.)

Petitioner has filed a proof of service showing service on March 20, 2024, ten days after the recited service date of March 10. The petition contains the arbitration agreement, the name of the arbitrator, and a copy of the award. The court grants the unopposed petition to confirm the award.

Petitioner shall prepare a separate proposed order and judgment.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
